    G

    Game - Class in cz.cvut.fel.pjv
    The Game class is the main entry point for the application.

    generateAbstractMap(int, int, int) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.LevelGenerator
    Generates an abstract map of chunks that outlines the level layout.
    generateLevel(ChunkManager, int, int, int) - Static method in class cz.cvut.fel.pjv.LevelGenerator
    Generates a level with the specified dimensions and path length.
